chapter_title.en: Ignorance of religious law leads to usury

text: ٤٤٧. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَنِ اتَّجَرَ بِغَيْرِ فِقْهٍ فَقَدِ ارْتَطَمَ فِي الرِّبَا.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 447. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Whoever trades without knowing the rules of religious law will be involved in usury.
